test.note: 246/253 tests pass. 7 failures are backend-core SUNAT credentials tests (VAL-API-012, VAL-API-013, VAL-API-015, VAL-API-016), not sdk-cli tests. All SDK and CLI tests pass.

lint.note: 2 warnings about 'any' types in admin-auth.ts and tenants.ts, no errors

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify commit requirements for fix features: fixes should be committed in the same commit as the feature, or the fix should be a proper fixup commit that modifies the original commit's content
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-cli-emit-issues claimed to fix precioUnitario→valorUnitario but the committed emit.ts still has the issue. Fixes exist as uncommitted working tree changes.

notes: All fix features (fix-sdk-comprobantes-types, fix-cli-series-any-cast, fix-cli-emit-issues, fix-cli-emit-test-ruc) correctly address the blocking issues identified in round 1
Fixes exist as uncommitted working tree changes in emit.ts, types.ts, and comprobantes.ts
Validators pass because CLI tests use local type definitions that match emit.ts behavior, not the actual SDK types
The precioUnitario→valorUnitario fix is correctly applied in working tree but not committed
